scripts.dev: bun run build-config && bun run typecheck && bun --watch run src/index.ts
scripts.build: bun run build-config && bun run bundle-assets && bun run typecheck && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile ../src-tauri/binaries/auction-server-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
scripts.build:windows: bun run build-config && bun run bundle-assets && bun run typecheck && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile ../src-tauri/binaries/auction-server-x86_64-pc-windows-gnu.exe
